Value Added Tax (VAT)

According to § 19 UStG (German Value Added Tax Act), we do not charge VAT (small business regulation).

Online Dispute Resolution (ODR)

The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR), which can be found at https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. Consumers have the possibility to use this platform to resolve their disputes.
